roa.docketEntryComment: CONFIDENTIAL Petition for Revocation of Parole PC 3000.08, PC 1203.2

/CAL: DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S OR PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X: PAROLE AGENT BRANDON LUGAR APPEARING/X: ADMITS VIOLATION #4/3000ADM/CTORD:THERE IS NO TIME LOST ON PAROLE DUE TO THE ADMISSION OF THIS VIOLATION/3000REIN/PAJ: 120 DAYS/X: PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 50 DAYS,/4019HALF/SAORD/SA1: ERICA S; 5-29-96/SA2: 1631-20TH STREET, SF AND 166 CAMBRIDGE STREET, SF/X: NO FIREARMS AND NO FIREARMS AMMUNITION/X: TODAY'S ADMISSION TO VIOLATION #4 CANNOT BE HELD AGAINST HIM INACTIVE FELONY #21001895/X: PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/

/CAL: PAROLE REVOCATION HEARING/X: PAROLE AGENT BRANDON LUGAR APPEARING/X: ORAL MOTION BY THE PEOPLE TO CONTINUE REVOCATION HEARING/X: WRITTEN OPPOSITION FILED BY DEFENSE/ARG&SUB/X: THE RULING ON THE MOTION TO CONTINUE IS AS FOLLOWS:/MO GRTD/X: 2 DATES SET; REVOCATION HEARINGS ON BOTH/VD: PAROLE REVOCATION HEARING ON 3-2-21/X: REVOCATION HEARING: 3-9-21 AND 3-16-21/DOP/

/CAL: PAROLE PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING / /X: HEARING PERTAINS TO VIOLATION #4;UNAUTHORIZED USE OF SOCIAL MEDIA   PLATFORM/X: PAROLE AGENT BRANDON LUGARAPPEARING/WIT SWORN DA: PAROLE AGENT CHES HUNTER FRY/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S 1-A 7 PG DOCUMENT; NOTICE & CONDITIONS OF PAROLE;/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S 2- A 1 PGDOCUMENT; FACE PAGE OF AN INSTAGRAM           ACCOUNT TITLED  BUBI415 ;/ /X: THE COURT FINDS THAT THE PEOPLE HAVE MET THEIR BURDEN OF PROOF/X: ORAL MOTION BY DEFENSE COUNSEL FOR OR RELEASE/MO DENIED/X: PAROLE REVOCATION HEARING NEXT DATE (2 DATES ARE SET FOR HEARING/,DOP/,

/CAL: PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X: PAROLE AGENT ROBERT ABAKAN APPEARING/PDP/WIAPTR/X: PAROLEE ENTERS A NOT TRUE AS TOTHE ALLEGATIONS/X: BAIL IS SET ON PAROLE ARRAIGNMENT/NB/ /X: PAROLE IS ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED/X: TIME IS NOT WAIVED FOR PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING//X: ORAL MOTION BY DEFENSE COUNSEL FOR OR RELEASE/MO DENIED/CONTD: PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING/DOP/
